response.justification: Bogdan has an extensive background in distributed systems and highly relevant domain expertise in geospatial data processing through his work on GISCollective and Open Green Map. However, his recent professional experience heavily favors TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, lacking recent, deep production experience with modern C++ or Rust, which are the primary technologies required for this role.
strengths: Strong domain knowledge in geospatial data processing and GIS applications.
Extensive experience with high-throughput distributed systems and low-latency architectures.
Demonstrated polyglot ability, showing a strong willingness to learn and adapt to new technology stacks.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust.
C++ experience is limited to a brief 7-month role in 2014-2015 and academic projects.
Recent roles are predominantly focused on full-stack web development and AI tooling rather than backend routing pipelines.
